title: agrostis bourgaei
intro: Agrostis bourgaei, also known as Bourgae's bent or Bourgae's hair grass, is a species of grass that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. Agrostis bourgaei has been known to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and acting as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and gastrointestinal issues.
